# pm-onethird product roadmap (1/3-2/3 + Union-Closed compatibility-geometry program)

*Generated by pm-onethird on 2026-05-21 17:00 BST — evening sweep. Manual edits will be overwritten next sweep — push back via OVERRIDE mail.*

**Scope.** Three repos: union_closed, one_third_width_three, one_third. Tags: onethird, one-third, lean, audit, union-closed, frankl.

**Headline state (2026-05-21 evening).** OneThird FULL REFACTOR Phase 2 is near complete — Pieces 1, 2, 3, 6 done; Piece 4 (MainAssembly proof-by-contradiction refactor) is in flight with its body half-landed; only Piece 5 (integration, retires the Step7 axiom) remains. The arc was markedly more iterative than its scoping doc implied — three checkpoints and Piece 6's first attempt each caught a real defect — but every gap was caught before downstream budget was sunk, and the refactor converged. Frankl: the two-part-contradiction audit arc completed (proof NOT closed — Y2 sound, Y1 reduced to a named open residual), the honest LaTeX paper is consolidated, and Daniel has directed investing in closing Y1 — a multi-week LaTeX-first research arc, now launched.

## OneThird arc — FULL REFACTOR Phase 2, 4 of 6 pieces done, Piece 4 in flight

Milestone 1 = a full gap-free width-3 1/3-2/3 proof. The FULL REFACTOR (mg-d8c7, Daniel's 2026-05-19 directive) rebuilds to a proof-by-contradiction matching the paper architecture, closing the Step7 paper-axiom.

**Piece status (6 pieces):**
- **Piece 1 — Steps 1-6 cascade port — COMPLETE** (verified: mg-496b compiler-checked genuine witness).
- **Piece 2 — S7-A-E concretisation — COMPLETE** (corrected form: Checkpoint 3 caught the original deliverable was the wrong object type; the R1/R2 re-scope built a concrete ChainLiftData and reconciled the bridge contract).
- **Piece 3 — S7-F bridge — COMPLETE** (verified: lem_layered_from_step7 finalized, full OneThird build green, 1448 jobs).
- **Piece 4 — MainAssembly proof-by-contradiction refactor — IN FLIGHT.** Pre-flight mg-92a8 GREEN (signatures pinned + satisfiability-verified, no 11th vacuity, 7 findings all expected Phase-1-to-2 drift). Body: MA-ThmE merged; MA-MinCex running; MA-Cascade + MA-Body chained.
- **Piece 5 — integration close-out — AHEAD, not filed.** Retires the Step7 paper-axiom, delivers the headline. Files on Piece 4 completion.
- **Piece 6 — full Step 8 G4 — COMPLETE.** Built (mg-65de redo after the first-attempt RED), resting on ONE new disclosed internal axiom, lem_layered_balanced_irreducible_base — verified TRUE with strong evidence (mg-44f1: 1.1M+ posets, zero counterexamples), permanently accepted. It is a net axiom SWAP for case3Witness when headline-wired, not an addition.

### Now (in flight)

- Frankl Y1-close LaTeX (mg-59d3) — dispatching.

## Frankl arc — proof NOT closed; investing in closing Y1

The Frankl publication question drove a full audit arc, then Daniel directed the closure investment:
- The two-part-contradiction audit: **Y2** (obstruction-class isotype landing) — mechanism SOUND (mg-aeee). **Y1** (level-1 Walsh vanishing) — its proof was BROKEN (relied on the provably-false UC14 R2); the mg-56b8 re-derivation validly REDUCED Y1 to one named open residual (the chi-S cohomology of a matched-cylinder cofiber). Y1 plausibly true, unproven.
- **mg-335b — Frankl LaTeX paper — DONE.** The scattered UC1-UC14 notes are consolidated into one honest referee-grade LaTeX paper documenting the true state (Y2 sound, Y1 the named open residual, the axiom, unconditional n=3/n=4). Caveat: inspection-verified, not compiler-checked (no local LaTeX toolchain).
- **mg-59d3 — Frankl-Y1-Close-LaTeX — LAUNCHED.** Per Daniel's 2026-05-21 directive (invest in closing Y1; LaTeX first, then independent validation, then Lean). Phase 1: compute the named residual, close Y1 in LaTeX. A genuine multi-week research arc; RED is an allowed outcome (Y1 is plausibly true, not certain).

**Net:** the Frankl proof is NOT closed; Frankl_Holds rests on case3_ss_obstruction_paper_axiom. The concrete cases n=3, n=4 are genuinely unconditional. Zulip post held. The closure path is now active (mg-59d3); Phases 2 (independent validation) and 3 (Lean) file on its GREEN.

## Decisions for Daniel
- **Piece-6 axiom — ratification.** lem_layered_balanced_irreducible_base is verified TRUE (mg-44f1) and pm-onethird has permanently accepted it — a genuine disclosed internal sub-lemma, a net axiom swap (not an addition). Ratify, or OVERRIDE.
- *(Resolved this period: Frankl Y1 invest-vs-hold — Daniel directed INVEST, superseding the PM recommendation to defer; mg-59d3 launched. Zulip post — Daniel directed HELD.)*

## Trajectory
- **OneThird:** strong convergence — the FULL REFACTOR is 4 of 6 pieces complete with Piece 4 in flight, in roughly 1.5 days of an arc the scoping doc estimated at 5-7 months. Honest caveat: markedly more iterative than scoped — three checkpoints plus Piece 6's first attempt each caught a real defect (a false signature contract, a wrong deliverable type, an unbuildable routing). The checkpoint regime is exactly why none reached downstream; the refactor is iterative-but-converging. Only Piece 5 (integration) remains before the Step7 axiom is retired and milestone 1 is delivered.
- **Frankl:** honestly NOT closed — but the audit arc converted a broken proof into a precisely-localized open residual plus a sound half, the honest LaTeX paper documents it, and the closure investment is now under way. Closing Y1 is a genuine multi-week research bet with real risk.

- mayor coordination reliability: two loop-drop incidents today — a mayor-side tool-call-formatting fault no-op'd several relay/dispatch cycles. Both caught via the paired-symptoms check and worked around (deliverables read directly); mayor is working the fix. Watch item — if it recurs, worth architect/Daniel attention.
- Refinery healthy — ~52 merges across the product repos in 24h.
